prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European mental health epidemiology syntheses

incidence.source: European cohort syntheses / IHME GBD context

burden.mortalityRate: Indirect; suicide risk and comorbidity effects

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria; structured assessment common in primary care and specialist pathways

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: moderate; primary care screening and referral pathways common in many countries
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with psychotherapy and pharmacotherapy access; variable across member states

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Structured primary care assessment and stepped-care models in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Psychotherapy (CBT/interpersonal therapy) and antidepressants; crisis pathways for suicidality
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for therapy in some systems and cross-country variability
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad access to evidence-based psychotherapy and antidepressants in many member states
